creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Landed in ports 17e659a39ef9 (1 and half day before this bug). Binary packages are scheduled to build every Tue/Thu/Sat/Sun. For some reason, the previous Tue (Jul 2) build was skipped, so wait for Thu (Jul 4) build. Each build may take a few days, depending on how many low-level ports were updated. Up to 1 week (for amd64 and i386 while aarch64 and powerpc64 take longer) in case of __FreeBSD_version bump (OS ABI) usually caused by freebsd-update (e.g., FreeBSD-SA-24:04.openssh).

Note, 2024Q3 should be branched soon which will cause large delay for /quarterly (but not /latest) package set.
